x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Creation Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that establishes a credit plan, defining its repayment structure, schedule, and terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Disbursement Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that allocates or transfers credit amounts into the credit plan, such as converting an outstanding balance into installments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Installment Booking Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that records scheduled installments (principal and/or interest) according to the credit plan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Repayment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where the borrower pays an installment, reducing the credit plan balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Prepayment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where the borrower repays part or all of the credit plan early, before scheduled dates.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Interest Accrual Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that calculates and adds interest to the credit plan balance over time.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Fee Charge Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that applies fees related to the credit plan (e.g., setup fee, service fee).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Penalty Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that applies charges for missed or late installments in the credit plan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Adjustment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that modifies the credit plan balance, schedule, or terms due to changes or corrections.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Closure Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that completes and terminates the credit plan once all obligations are fulfilled or canceled.
